fields.label: Model
fields.description: Qualified model override (e.g. openai:gpt-4o). Defaults to global model.

fields.label: Can Message
fields.description: Agent IDs this agent can talk to. Use * for all.

sections.label: Limits
sections.description: Runtime limits for the tool loop, context compression, and prompt construction.

fields.label: Max Tool Rounds
fields.description: Maximum tool-call loop iterations per run.

fields.label: Compression Threshold
fields.description: Context compression triggers when estimated tokens exceed this ratio of the context window (0-1).

fields.label: Min Keep Messages
fields.description: Minimum number of recent messages to preserve during truncation and compression.

fields.label: Max Tool Result Chars
fields.description: Maximum characters per old tool result before truncation.

fields.label: Max Workspace File Chars
fields.description: Maximum characters per workspace file (AGENT.md, MEMORY.md) in the system prompt.

sections.label: Filters
sections.description: Allow/deny lists for tools and skills.

fields.label: Tools Allow
fields.description: Tool names to allow (empty = all allowed).

fields.label: Tools Deny
fields.description: Tool names to deny (deny wins over allow).

fields.label: Skills Allow
fields.description: Skill names to allow (empty = all allowed).

fields.label: Skills Deny
fields.description: Skill names to deny (deny wins over allow).
